attacking_style: Tends to attack early on climbs or from distance, often mistiming efforts before maximum gradients or launching long-range moves that prove unsustainable. Prefers initiating on penultimate or final climbs but struggles with execution timing.
team_tactics: Limited evidence of strong team support in attacking phases; appears to rely on individual moves rather than coordinated team setups, with rivals' teams (INEOS, BORA) controlling rather than his own.
terrain_preference: Steep climbs where GC status still commands respect from rivals. Exposed on long-range efforts requiring sustained power over 10+ km, particularly when descents separate from finish climbs.
vulnerability: Poor timing of attacks—goes too early before maximum gradients or launches unsustainable long-range moves. Vulnerable to positioning squeezes and immediate neutralization by well-organized rival teams.
key_patterns: Attacks marked/neutralized immediately by organized rival teams (INEOS, positioning squeeze): 3 instances
Mistimes efforts: goes before maximum gradient or too far from finish: 2 instances
Still commands GC-level respect from rivals who police his moves: 2 instances
form_trajectory: negative: Recent attacks (2023) show poor timing and inability to sustain efforts, immediately neutralized without forcing rivals to work
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 3
